items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Win32-style raised button with outset bevel. Instant swap to inset bevel on press.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Win32-style sunken text field. Inset bevel, white background, solid placeholder color.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Win32-style tab control. Active tab is taller and accent-colored.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Win32-style modal dialog. Dark title bar, bevel-out panel, X button top-right.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Win32-style progress bar. Bevel-in sunken track, solid primary fill.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Win32-style combo box. Bevel-in input with bevel-out dropdown button.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Win32-style data table with solid borders and selection highlight.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Win32-style raised panel with bevel-out border.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Win32-style 13px checkbox. Inset bevel, white fill, black check glyph. Supports checked, unchecked, indeterminate.
